summary: The Docker-based reproduction confirms that a crafted ZIP plugin with entry ../test-plugin-evil/ESCAPED.txt bypasses the String.startsWith() path traversal check in Unzip.extract() and writes a file to a sibling directory outside the intended extraction directory.
expected_security_impact: Running the reproduction should create a malicious ZIP file named test-plugin.zip, extract it via PF4J's FileUtils.expandIfZip(), and write a file to test-plugin-evil/ESCAPED.txt outside the intended test-plugin/ extraction directory, confirming the path traversal bypass.
actual_observed_result: Running ./reproduction/run.sh cloned the PF4J repository at commit 2ed63d1, built the Docker image, compiled the PF4J utility sources and exploit program, and ran the exploit. The file ESCAPED.txt was written to /tmp/zipslip-poc/test-plugin-evil/ outside the intended extraction directory /tmp/zipslip-poc/test-plugin/. The proof string [EVOHUNT] ZIP_SLIP_PREFIX_BYPASS_CONFIRMED was emitted.
verification_method: The exploit program creates a malicious ZIP file with entry ../test-plugin-evil/ESCAPED.txt, calls FileUtils.expandIfZip() to extract it using PF4J's vulnerable Unzip.extract() method, then checks whether the file exists at the escaped path /tmp/zipslip-poc/test-plugin-evil/ESCAPED.txt. The check distinguishes path traversal from normal extraction by verifying the file was written to a directory other than the intended extraction destination. The proof string [EVOHUNT] ZIP_SLIP_PREFIX_BYPASS_CONFIRMED is printed only when the escaped file is confirmed to exist outside the target directory.
evidence_produced_by_run: Container logs show: [evohunt] VULNERABLE: File escaped to /tmp/zipslip-poc/test-plugin-evil/ESCAPED.txt
Container logs show: [evohunt] Escaped file content: EVIL_CONTENT_ESCAPED_FROM_ZIP
Container logs show: [evohunt] The destination directory was: /tmp/zipslip-poc/test-plugin
Container logs show: [evohunt] File was written to sibling directory: /tmp/zipslip-poc/test-plugin-evil
Proof string [EVOHUNT] ZIP_SLIP_PREFIX_BYPASS_CONFIRMED was emitted, confirming successful path traversal.
The run.sh script exited with code 0, confirming end-to-end reproduction success.

reproduction.source_acquisition: run.sh clones the target repository on the host, checks out the pinned vulnerable commit 2ed63d1, and mounts that checkout into the container at /target-repo.
